mission.title: dapr: Enable Bi-Directional Bindings
mission.description: Enable Bi-Directional Bindings. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current dapr deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dapr version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
helm list -n dapr 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dapr installation.

steps.title: Review dapr configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dapr configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
kubectl get configmap -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dapr
```
## In what area(s)?

Input/Output Bindings

## Describe the proposal

In the current design of dapr there are two features for interacting with external resources: service triggering through [input

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enable Bi-Directional Bindings
steps.description:
We will be updating here soon. Thanks for your participation in this discussion, it helps.
```yaml
> connectors.trigger.kafka
> connectors.output.kafka
>
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
kubectl get events -n dapr --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Enable Bi-Directional Bindings" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: We will be updating here soon. Thanks for your participation in this discussion, it helps.
